label: Academic credential
description: Degree or educational qualification establishing academic foundation.

label: Federal award
description: Award or recognition from federal agencies (NSF, White House, etc.).

label: Society fellowship
description: Election to fellowship in professional societies (APS, ASME, AIMBE, etc.).

label: Academy election
description: Election to national academies (NAE, AAAS, NAI) representing highest honors.

label: Research metrics
description: Quantitative measures of research productivity and impact (publications, citations, h-index).

label: Innovation award
description: Recognition of innovative work and practical applications.

label: Editorial leadership
description: Editorial positions in scholarly journals and publications.

label: Mentorship outcomes
description: Documentation of student training and career placements.
